---
title: Voting Statistics
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

df = readxl::read_xlsx("whiteboardpollresults.xlsx")
```

How many polls have we had? `r length(unique(df$poll))`
How many votes have been counted? `r sum(df$votes)`
